examples: They even bestride the carriage lamps.
You face him, bestride on his body one's knees.
Mr Sarkozy has a further reason for wanting to bestride the world again.
And the supposed unipolar moment, when America was left to bestride a single-superpower world?
Major Western brands are unlikely to be able to bestride the globe in the same way they have done over the past 100 years or more.
